resources.string:
🔮 Welcome to ArcaneChat✨

To get in contact with friends:

🤳🏻 Tap "QR code" on the main screen of both devices. Choose "Scan QR Code" on one device, and point it at the other

🔗 If not in the same room, you can share your invite link from "Invite friends" in the menu

📢 Join the [Official ArcaneChat Channel](%1$s) to keep updated about the development status.

🔮 What's new?

✦ Greatly enhanced experimental video/audio calls with better system integration

✦ Added a basic sticker picker

✦ Improved attachment selector

✦ Further minimize metadata in messages

✦ Increase resilience of multi-relay usage: if on relay goes down, messages are still received in the others

✦ Better synchronization of notifications state across multiple devices

✦ Fixed invitation link to join the 📢 [Official ArcaneChat Channel](%2$s)

✦ Several bug fixes and updated translations


💜 Please donate to help us remain independent and continue to bring improvements: %1$s
